name: penny-demo
description: Browser-based interactive demo of Penny — an AI bookkeeper for US small business owners.

scripts.deploy: vite build && cd ../.. && rsync -av --delete BookKeeping/demo/dist/ penny/demo/ && git add penny/demo/ && git commit -m "deploy: ${npm_config_msg:-update}" && git push origin main
scripts.deploy:prompts: cd ../.. && rsync -av BookKeeping/demo/public/prompts/ penny/demo/prompts/ && git add penny/demo/prompts/ && git commit -m "deploy: prompts - ${npm_config_msg:-update}" && git push origin main
